Requestor: Byrna
Date: 7/30/90
Agency:

Subject:

SEI

C/I Code
Lobbying
Revolving Door
Personal Use
Misc.

Computer Entry Summary: (No more than 5 typed lines for summary.)
A political committee which received a contribution of $6,000 from a trust, pursuant to the terms in a will, must return the contribution to the trustee.

Code Section and/or Regulation Nos.
Section 85302

Bulletin Summary: (If you need more space please write on back.)

sections.question_synthetic: Whether a political committee may retain a $6,000 contribution received from a trust pursuant to the terms of a will, or must return it to the trustee.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: A political committee that received a $6,000 contribution from a trust pursuant to the terms in a will must return the contribution to the trustee.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is a telephone advice summary sheet rather than a full advice letter. No formal question or conclusion sections present; information extracted from 'Computer Entry Summary' field. Staff: Alice Hughes. Requestor: Byrna. Relevant code sections: 85302 and reference to Section 84308. Subject matter involves campaign finance and contribution restrictions.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether a political committee may retain a $6,000 contribution received from a trust pursuant to the terms of a will, or must return it to the trustee.

CONCLUSION: A political committee that received a $6,000 contribution from a trust pursuant to the terms in a will must return the contribution to the trustee.

embedding.summary: FPPC advice letter regarding campaign contributions from trusts. The Commission advised that a political committee must return a $6,000 contribution received from a trust pursuant to will provisions to the trustee.
